typecheck.command: go build "/Users/wiz/go-choir/cmd/..." && pnpm --dir "/Users/wiz/go-choir/frontend" install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --dir "/Users/wiz/go-choir/frontend" build

blockingIssues.description: The original deploy workflow invoked bare `nix` and `nixos-rebuild` inside a non-interactive SSH session on Node B without exporting the NixOS system PATH or using absolute binary paths, so the automated deployment could not run until later follow-up commits fixed the remote environment handling.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that NixOS deploy steps executed through non-interactive SSH must export `/run/current-system/sw/bin` and `/run/wrappers/bin`, or use absolute paths for `nix` and `nixos-rebuild`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The original `ci-deploy-pipeline` workflow followed the high-level deploy pattern but shipped bare `nix` and `nixos-rebuild` commands in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, which failed on Node B until follow-up commits `7f7e872`, `de706ce`, and `c4240ff` corrected the PATH handling.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that worker handoff `commitId` values must point to the implementation commit that introduced the reviewed changes, not a later docs-only or follow-up commit.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `ci-deploy-pipeline` handoff records commit `fafd779`, which only adds `.factory/library/ci-deploy-pipeline.md`, while commit `3460224` contains the actual workflow implementation reviewed by scrutiny.
